function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_epaper_panel
alias: hearthline_epaper_panel
purchased_on: 2025-12-26
total_eur: 66
counterparty: Pimoroni Europe SARL
project: Hearthline
related_entity: NORA
lines:
  - item: 7.5 inch e-paper panel
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 54
    line_eur: 54
  - item: mounting standoffs and acrylic sheet
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 12
    line_eur: 12
---
# Kitchen summary display parts

```text
+----------------+------------------------------+
| field          | value                        |
+----------------+------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                         |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_epaper_panel |
| alias          | hearthline_epaper_panel      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-26                   |
| total_eur      | 66                           |
| counterparty   | Pimoroni Europe SARL         |
| project        | Hearthline                   |
| related_entity | NORA                         |
+----------------+------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | 7.5 inch e-paper panel               | 1   | 54       | 54       |
| 2 | mounting standoffs and acrylic sheet | 1   | 12       | 12       |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                                |     |          | 66       |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the first Hearthline experiments for a calm kitchen-facing weekly view.

function.message: Done — I processed the next inbox item, OCR-structured the referenced Nora-related bill by adding YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/purchases/2025_12_26__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md` (while preserving the full original note body), and then removed the handled inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS and relevant workflow/schema docs before task work, preserved original file body during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox instruction requested OCR for bills related to NORA. Preflight narrowed this to one related file: `50_finance/purchases/2025_12_26__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md`. That file contained all required bill fields and line items; frontmatter was added according to `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, with body preserved exactly. After successful processing, inbox file deletion followed `99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md` and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
